name: Vander Decken IX
alt_names: バンダーデッケン九世
description:
__Height:__ 352 cm (11'7")
__Affiliations:__ Flying Pirates
__Devil Fruit:__ Mato Mato no Mi (Mark-Mark Fruit)
__Devil Fruit Type:__ Paramecia

Vander Decken IX is the current captain of the Flying Pirates on their ship, the Flying Dutchman, and the ninth descendant of the Vander Decken of legend. He is a Japanese bullhead shark fishman.
